data.title: BTC's failed attempt at $110K signals risk for bulls; $112K resistance strong, while numerous support levels stand.
data.description: Following the release of robust US employment data, the Bitcoin price surge halted at $110,000, encountering considerable resistance. The $112,000 mark now poses a significant barrier for further advancement, while multiple support levels lie beneath to cushion any potential downturns.

data.title: Embrace adversity in business to build resilience. Stay calm and learn from challenges. - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: In the pursuit of business success, facing challenges is unavoidable. Rather than feeling overwhelmed, it is crucial to maintain resilience. Embracing adversity and using it as a learning opportunity can lead to growth and advancement in the business world.

data.title: WELL Health Technologies Corp. reports successful election of directors at its annual meeting. TSX: WELL (TSX:WELL) (OTCQX: WHTCF).
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, WELL Health Technologies Corp. (TSX: WELL) (OTCQX: WHTCF), a digital healthcare company, held its annual general meeting on June 30, 2025. The meeting saw the election of directors for the Company, aiming to positively impact health outcomes globally through technology for healthcare practitioners and patients. The event marked a significant milestone for the company as it continues its mission.

data.title: AMC Networks increases offer to buy senior notes due 2029 from $450M to $600M. Early results show positive response.
data.description: AMC Networks Inc. (Nasdaq: AMCX) revealed the initial outcomes of its cash tender offer to acquire its 4.25% Senior Notes due 2029, as of 5:00 p.m. on July 1, 2025, raising the maximum purchase amount from $450,000,000 to $600,000,000.

data.title: Wall Street banks to reward shareholders with over $100 billion in dividend hikes and buybacks after acing Fed's 2025 stress test. JPMorgan, Morgan Stanley, and Goldman leading the capital return wave.
data.description: Wall Street's biggest banks are rewarding shareholders with over $100 billion in dividend hikes and buybacks, following the Federal Reserve's stress test results showing all 22 institutions comfortably above minimum capital requirements. The common equity tier 1 (CET1) ratio remained at 11.6% under a severe recession scenario, well above the 4.5% regulatory threshold. This means banks would maintain strong capital levels even in a deep recession without government support. Leading banks like JPMorgan Chase & Co. announced a 7% dividend hike and $50 billion in buybacks. Check Benzinga.com for more details.

data.title: YieldMax® ETFs' distributions declared for SMCY, ULTY, MSTY, WNTR, LFGY, and more in latest announcement.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.2%, showing a positive trend in the job market. Additionally, the stock market reached a new record high, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average closing at 35,000 points. This surge was driven by strong performances in the tech and healthcare sectors. On the other hand, inflation rose by 2.5% last month due to increased consumer spending and rising energy prices. Overall, these indicators suggest a growing economy with potential challenges in the form of inflation.

data.title: Economist Justin Wolfers warns that US risks Turkey-style inflation horror show if Trump continues low rates, citing Turkey's 86% inflation rising to 38%.
data.description: Economist Justin Wolfers has issued a warning about President Donald Trump's fixation on low interest rates potentially leading the U.S. down a problematic path similar to Turkey's inflation crisis. In a recent CNN appearance, Wolfers expressed concerns over leaders advocating for consistently low interest rates without considering inflation or protective measures. Drawing parallels with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, who faced an inflation rate of 86% due to low interest rates, which has now stabilized at 38%, Wolfers emphasized the dangers of such policies. The economist's remarks highlight the risks of disregarding inflation dynamics and institutional safeguards in favor of low interest rates. This information was shared in a clip from Wolfers' appearance, and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mike Lindell Media Corporation launches VOCL with innovative creator features for streaming, live chat, premieres, and monetization.
data.description: VOCL stands out as more than a typical social platform. It represents a mission-oriented initiative by the Mike Lindell Media Corporation, dedicated to empowering creators, amplifying truth, and fostering genuine community connections. This movement aims to prioritize authenticity and collaboration in a digital space inundated with noise and misinformation.

data.title: CF & CFRP Market projected to reach $35.55 billion by 2030 according to MarketsandMarkets™ report.
data.description: On July 4, 2025 in Delray Beach, Florida, a study regarding the CF & CFRP Market highlighted various aspects such as precursor type (PAN, Pitch), source, resin type, and manufacturing processes including Lay-Up, Compression Molding, Resin Transfer Molding, Filament Winding, Injection Molding, and Pultrusion. The report also covered details on the end-use industry and regional insights. This analysis encompassed a range of numbers, statistics, and trends within the industry, offering a comprehensive overview of the CF & CFRP market landscape.

data.title: Investors of Phoenix FIRE claim exit scam as owner moves to dismiss lawsuit over crypto project takeover.
data.description: Daniel Ianello has filed a request with a Tennessee court to have a lawsuit dropped that alleges he was involved in a scam following his acquisition of The Phoenix crypto project.

data.title: Global fusion energy market report released by ResearchAndMarkets.com, covering 2025-2034. Highlights regulatory impact, patent analysis, start-up landscape.
data.description: The "Fusion Energy Market - A Global and Regional Analysis" report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, offering insights from 2025 to 2034. This market analysis focuses on applications, technology, fuel cycle, and countries involved. The global fusion energy market is witnessing significant activity with key players including large international collaborations, government-supported research groups, and private enterprises. The emphasis is on magnetic confinement technologies such as tokamaks, with a growing interest in this sector.
